summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of all 7 dashboard sub-pages. All pages render correctly with proper components, data, and navigation. Sidebar navigation works perfectly with correct highlighting of active pages.

issues: Minor console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) from recharts library during navigation transitions - does not affect functionality

Dashboard Market shows 6 vehicle listings with images and deal scores (92, 85, 78, 95, 88, 91)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: recharts library shows console warnings about chart dimensions during navigation transitions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components to suppress warnings
